text:
The authority shall develop and implement policies that provide the public with a reasonable opportunity to appear before the authority and to speak on any issue under the jurisdiction of the authority.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 6(h), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.14, eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1006. Motor Vehicle Crime Prevention Auth.
##### § 1006.062 — Public Testimony

The authority shall develop and implement policies that provide the public with a reasonable opportunity to appear before the authority and to speak on any issue under the jurisdiction of the authority.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 6(h), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.14, eff. September 1, 2019.
